text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho has garnered a great deal
of attention as a showdown between two top
contenders—Satono Diamond and Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reminded of the spring Tenno Sho they ran
together, Mejiro McQueen and Tokai Teio find
themselves very curious in the outcome.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond is delighted to be contributing
to the Umamusume world through the attention
their showdown is drawing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Becoming an illustrious runner takes skill. Satono
Diamond announces her intent to win the spring
Tenno Sho and show everyone what she's made
of!
